title: Headings
instructions:
Create a document with headings at different levels:

1. Level-1 heading "Introduction"
2. Level-2 heading "Background"
3. Under the level-2 heading, write a line "Typst is a new typesetting system."
4. Level-2 heading "Goals"
hint: = is level-1, == is level-2, === is level-3. A space is required after the heading marker.
